title: Me flexing cold on 3-12-09 35 years old 5'10" 187 lbs 14%

transcript.text: Hey, what's up? So I hit 180. I passed 180 pound threshold, so I figured I'd do another flex video
Since the last time I did it, I weighed like 165 ish. So check it out. I'm standing in running
Shorts. That's all I've got. And I'm weighing about 187, 188 ish. Almost 90, almost 190.
My first dial is where I started out. And see how that touches the ground? The height is
Around 5'10". As you can see, 70, about 70 inches. Around 5'10". Right. 38, 5'10". Fat percentage
Is around 14%. Cold flexing. I shaved myself. Look weird though. Probably shouldn't have.
Okay, so let's see. There's one arm. Arm pop. There's my chest. No serrations. Arms. There's
My chest. I do have a little bit of a belly. Back. How strong am I? I know I could bench
200 for reps. Deep squat. I know I could deep squat 185, no problem. So that's me. That's
Where I'm at. If I ever get to 190, I'll do another one. And I'm going to do another
One demonstrating how you can lose a belly in one day. That's coming up.
